goal: 给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有 markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Run the Flask app, verify every feature end-to-end (tree, tags, search, doc view, wikilinks, backlinks, editor, hamburger), and fix any remaining issues in app.py, app.js, style.css, and index.html

children.description: Test all Flask API endpoints (/api/tree, /api/doc, /api/tags, /api/search, /api/rebuild) using Flask test_client to confirm correct responses, status codes, and data shapes
Validate app.js has no syntax errors (node --check), verify all DOM element IDs referenced in JS exist in index.html, and confirm the app serves index.html at /
Verify tree rendering: /api/tree returns correct structure, JS buildTreeNode creates clickable items that call loadDoc, and clicking a file in the tree loads the document

Verify search: typing in search input triggers debounced fetch, results appear in dropdown, clicking a result calls loadDoc and clears input. Verify tags: tag cloud renders, clicking a tag filters the tree, clicking again clears filter.

Verify wiki-link rendering: [[target]] in markdown becomes <a class='wiki-link' data-target='...'> in HTML. Verify JS click handler resolves target to a path and calls loadDoc. Verify backlinks panel populates from API response.

Verify editor: edit button toggles textarea visibility and fetches raw content, save button POSTs to /api/doc and reloads, cancel hides editor. Verify hamburger: button toggles sidebar visibility on mobile.
Remove the unused templates/index.html Jinja2 file that is never served by any route

tree.description: Commit all web/ files and push to origin master
